title: A Brief Review of Future Lepton-Hadron and Photon-Hadron Colliders
author_string: S. Sultansoy, A. K. Ciftci, E. Recepoglu, O. Yavas
abstract: Options for future $lepton-proton,lepton-nucleus,γ-proton,γ-nucleus$ and FEL$γ-nucleus$ colliders are discussed. In the spirit of this content, we consider TESLAxHERA, LEPxLHC, $μ$xTEVATRON, exRHIC, LinacxLHC, $\sqrt{s}=3TeV$ $μp$ and CLIC based colliders.
